## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** SortableTable.jsx (data table with broken ARIA sort) **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular, Auditory ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 3 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | ### Perspectives That Passed None. All three escalated perspectives have findings. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - [Non-semantic table structure] — Screen Reader Semantic — CRITICAL — 1.3.1 - [Missing aria-sort on sort buttons] — Screen Reader Semantic — CRITICAL — 4.1.2 - [Pagination lacks aria-current] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 2.4.4 - [No aria-live on page count] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 - [Pagination links use href="#" without context] — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.4.4 **UX Design** - [Pagination color-only current page indicator] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 1.4.1 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None. All findings are code-level and can be confirmed from source. --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Table structure uses CSS grid divs instead of semantic elements **WCAG:** 1.3.1 Info and Relationships **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX: line 35-82 uses divs with role="region" instead of
, , **Fix:** Replace CSS grid with semantic
, , , ,
elements. Add scope="col" to headers. **Finding:** Sort buttons lack aria-sort attribute to indicate sort state **WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX: line 50-65 buttons missing aria-sort="ascending"/"descending"/"none" **Fix:** Add aria-sort attribute to sort buttons matching current sort state. **Finding:** Pagination links use href="#" without page context **WCAG:** 2.4.4 Link Purpose **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX: line 77-82 anchor links with href="#" and no aria-label **Fix:** Add aria-label="Page {i+1} of {totalPages}" to each link. **Finding:** Pagination lacks aria-current for current page **WCAG:** 2.4.4 Link Purpose **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX: line 77-82 current page indicated by color only **Fix:** Add aria-current="page" to current page link. **Finding:** Page count updates not announced via aria-live **WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX: line 85-87 table-meta div missing role="status" and aria-live **Fix:** Add role="status" and aria-live="polite" to table-meta container. **Finding:** Current page indicator uses color only (no text/aria) **WCAG:** 1.4.1 Use of Color **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** CSS: .page-link.current uses background color only **Fix:** Add "Current Page 2 of 3" text or aria-label to current page link. ``` --- ## Key Issues by Perspective ### Keyboard & Motor Access (MEDIUM) - **Pagination links use href="#"** (MAJOR): Screen readers cannot announce destination pages - **Current page indicated by color only** (MINOR): Violates color-as-only-indicator rule ### Screen Reader Semantic (HIGH) - **Non-semantic table structure** (CRITICAL): WCAG 1.3.1 failure - **Missing aria-sort attributes** (CRITICAL): WCAG 4.1.2 failure - **Pagination lacks aria-current** (MAJOR): WCAG 2.4.4 failure - **No aria-live for page count updates** (MAJOR): WCAG 4.1.3 failure ### Cognitive & Neurodivergent (MEDIUM) - **Color-only pagination indicator** (MINOR): Violates 1.4.1 --- ## Evidence from Code 1. **Non-semantic table structure**: ```jsx
{/* No , , , ,
elements */} ``` 2. **Missing aria-sort**: ```jsx ``` 3. **Pagination issues**: ```jsx { e.preventDefault(); setPage(i); }}> {i + 1} ``` --- ## Recommended Fixes 1. **Semantic Table Structure**: ```jsx {COLUMNS.map(col => ( ))} {pageData.map(row => ( {/* ... */} ))}
